title: BigBear.ai Holdings (BBAI) Earnings Report: Key Numbers & Transcript Summary
text: BigBear.ai Holdings (BBAI) earnings report with key financial numbers and transcript summary. Q1 2026 key metrics: revenue $34.4M (beat $33.6M estimate), EPS -$0.12 (miss -$0.08 estimate), backlog $281.9M (up 14% QoQ), gross margin 34% (up from 21.3% YoY). The report highlights the company's transformation toward higher-margin AI products while managing a transition away from lower-margin government services contracts.
